Source: RigModels aggregate page for glucose meter/lancing device
Model page: https://rigmodels.com/model.php?view=Glucose_Meter-3d-model__d515e7c2663e4ace8d76a46885bba960
Asset hash: d515e7c2663e4ace8d76a46885bba960

This folder contains a decoded OBJ generated from the model.data payload
and linked base color textures for:
- Glucose meter
- Glucose test tip
- Blood lancet
- Lancing device

Please review upstream license terms before shipping commercially.
